description_long: This is a dark, upholstered sofa with a broad, rectangular seat and prominent, rolled armrests that extend to the same height as the backrest. The backrest and armrests are tufted, giving the sofa a classic, Chesterfield-inspired appearance. The seat area is wide and flat, lacking visible individual seat cushions, and appears to be a single, continuous surface. The sofa stands on four short, rounded legs, which are only slightly visible beneath the base. The upholstery has a subtle, textured weave, and the overall form is robust and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The design is both functional and decorative, offering ample seating space and a visually cohesive silhouette.
description: A dark, tufted sofa with rolled armrests and a single, wide seat cushion, featuring a classic, textured upholstery and short, rounded legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tufted backrest, and both rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the rolled profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion with an attached, tufted backrest; no individual seat or back cushions visible.
attribute_armrest_style: Prominent, rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered and padded, with a classic rounded profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, with a simple, unobtrusive design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with deep tufting, matching the armrest height and forming a unified, curved profile.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a subtle woven texture and visible tufting on the backrest and armrests.
